author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Manga 'Soara to Mamono no Ie' Receives TV Anime Adaptation in 2027
Production company Kadokawa opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Hidenori Yamaji's Soara to Mamono no Ie (Soara and the House of Monsters) manga on Wednesday, revealing the main cast, staff, an ultra teaser visual (pictured), and ultra teaser promotional video. The anime series will premiere in 2027. Voice actors Ikumi Hasegawa (86) and Ayumu Murase (Mairimashita! Iruma-kun) are starring as Soara and Krik, respectively.
